economic_mechanism: In bullish or neutral regimes, Monday-entered 45-DTE put credit spreads may harvest front-loaded theta while a 21-DTE calendar exit avoids late-cycle gamma and tail exposure relative to an otherwise-identical 5-DTE-stop control.
candidate_or_family_scope: Exact family pcs-monday-45dte-exit21-vs-exit5-train-proxy: one-lot $1-wide approximately 0.20-delta 45-DTE Monday put credit spreads with a 21-DTE stop versus an otherwise-identical 5-DTE-stop control across BAC, F, SOFI, PLTR, TSLL, SMCI, AMD, and AAPL; train-only Black-Scholes proxy evidence, capital_fit_usd/max_loss_usd $85.76..$235.43, operating max_lots=1.
falsifier: Close the exact family if no symbol's chronological first 60% has at least eight non-vacuous trades on each labeled proxy cost axis, positive PnL on both axes, exact ledger/no-same-bar integrity, one-lot max_loss_usd at or below $300, and candidate worst-axis PnL strictly above the identical 5-DTE-stop control; qualifying pooled worst-axis PnL must also be positive. Do not spend the final 40% holdout when train fails.

strategy_advancement.summary: No candidate advanced beyond F0. All eight symbols completed, no symbol passed both train cost axes, every 5% row was negative, seven of eight fixed-$0.01 rows were negative, and AAPL's +$128.60 fixed-cost result paired with -$470.44 at 5% slip. The final 40% holdout remained untouched.

search_information.summary: The fixed-DNA train-only causal-management lab closed one exact Monday 45-DTE PCS family without spending holdout. Candidate calendar stops occurred only 17 times across 16 candidate symbol/cost rows, with F and SOFI path-identical to control and profit-target/regime exits dominant, so the result is a cost-adjusted expectancy failure under sparsely exercised calendar-stop contrast rather than pure early-theta/late-gamma isolation. The finalizer also repaired ambiguous lot labels so all living rows distinguish theoretical sleeve capacity from the one-lot operating cap and reproduced the unchanged strategy result.

useful_deltas.summary: The exact fixed-DNA pcs-monday-45dte-exit21-vs-exit5-train-proxy family closed at F0: 8/8 completed, 0 dual-cost train passes, all 5% rows negative, seven fixed-cost rows negative, no holdout simulation, no registry write, and no candidate or capital seat.

The reusable train-only causal-management lab now fails closed on invalid, vacuous, or inexact controls and labels max_loss_usd plus one-lot operating capacity explicitly; shared summarizer capacity is retained only as theoretical_max_lots. Behavioral and negative-control tests cover candidate/control purity, dual-cost gates, chronology-safe ranking, calendar-stop diagnostics, and operating-versus-theoretical lot labels.

The finalizer regenerated the canonical artifact after the label repair and reproduced every substantive field except generated_at: 8 rows, 32 candidate/control cost rows, 17 candidate calendar-stop exits, explicit one-lot operating fields, and the unchanged FAMILY_CLOSED decision at canonical SHA-256 39113fe2aa6fa071a09902470fad3e39a30cf765a2dfdf32e1d42986a9c6446e.

critic_findings.finding: The evidence isolates a pure early-theta versus late-gamma calendar-stop mechanism.
critic_findings.rationale: Calendar-stop contrast was sparse: 17 candidate dte_stop exits across 16 candidate symbol/cost rows, F and SOFI were path-identical to control, and profit-target/regime-flip exits dominated. Final surfaces describe a cost-adjusted expectancy failure under sparsely exercised calendar-stop contrast.

critic_findings.finding: The close should quarantine all Monday PCS or all 45-DTE management variants.
critic_findings.rationale: The durable close is limited to pcs-monday-45dte-exit21-vs-exit5-train-proxy and nearby stop nudges or symbol cherry-picks of the same DNA. A genuinely new mechanism or evidence class is not globally frozen.

critic_findings.finding: Axis max_lots=3 can remain beside a top-level one-lot operating cap without explicit qualification.
critic_findings.rationale: Living axis rows now retain shared-summarizer capacity as theoretical_max_lots while setting operating_max_lots=1 and max_lots=1; top-level rows now state capital_fit_usd, max_loss_usd, one_lot_max_loss_usd, operating_max_lots=1, and max_lots=1. The canonical experiment was rerun and its strategy decision was unchanged.

critic_findings.finding: The challenger's four-test rerun is sufficient final verification.
critic_findings.rationale: The finalizer independently ran 37 focused behavioral/boundary/negative-control/regression tests, five new-lab tests, compile, substantive experiment reproduction, platform smoke, coverage regeneration, and the full 269-test suite; all passed.

critic_findings.finding: The low-HV NEXT may rank on contemporaneous volatility or reach option marks before underlying validation.
critic_findings.rationale: The sole NEXT requires prior completed 60-session HV known before each rank month, same-date top-quartile controls, chronological underlying train then untouched holdout, and option marks only after the underlying mechanism advances.

next: Build and run one lagged monthly cross-sectional low-realized-volatility underlying pre-screen over a fixed liquid multi-name universe: rank only on prior completed 60-session HV known before each rank month, compare bottom-quartile forward returns with same-date top-quartile controls, use chronological train then untouched holdout on the underlying mechanism, and reach option marks only if that mechanism advances under a predeclared falsifier; do not retune the closed PCS stop family or take paper/shadow/arm/live action.
